segments.text: The only one thing that I need to
remember is variation.
Variation. That's all. Variation can
come in the form of body language.
Variation can come in the form of tone,
voice, pitch, words, the way that I'm
delivering it, how I've ordered it, how
I've sequenced it, the fact that I'm
sitting and doing it, the fact that I'm
moving around and doing, the fact that
I'm like sitting on the ground and doing
it, whatever way that you're trying to
communicate. Right? See the point behind
all of this is
to have an awareness of it.
But just having that consciousness and
awareness of this is extremely useful
for me when I'm actually doing it and
the more number of times I repeat it in
conversations, one-on-one conversations,
group conversations, okay? the more
number of times I'm aware and then I'm
using these settings to repeat it. I'm
solidifying these behaviors in me. Your
way of communicating is nothing but a
set of behaviors. That's all.
